name: Verify Dashboard Load
expected: Dashboard loads successfully with welcome message

name: Verify Total Balance Display
expected: Total balance sum matches the individual account balances
steps: Calculate sum of all checking and savings accounts
Assert total balance displays the correct sum

name: Verify Recent Transactions Widget
expected: Recent transactions widget displays up to 5 latest transactions
steps: Assert that maximum 5 transactions are shown
Assert transactions are sorted by date descending

name: Verify Quick Pay Bill Link
expected: Clicking quick pay bill navigates to /bank/bill-pay
steps: Click the 'Pay Bill' quick action button

name: Verify Theme Toggle
expected: Clicking the moon/sun icon toggles dark mode
steps: Click the theme toggle icon in the top navigation bar
Assert that the 'dark' class is added/removed from the HTML tag
